title: Deadly shooting; 'Kyle & Jackie O show' over; Clintons grilled | 9News Sydney | Tuesday March 3
description: Two women have been attacked in their own Potts Point apartments by a stranger armed with a knife. The actions of the police are now under investigation after the man was shot and killed. In other news, the Kyle & Jackie O radio show is over. Jackie Henderson has left the show after 22 years following an on-air﻿ argument between her and Kyle Sandilands during the program on February 20.
